title: Multi-cluster
description: Multi-cluster documents multi cluster material for Istio in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an entity page for the service-mesh class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Configure Trust, Root CA, Intermediate CA, Multi-Primary on different networks, and Istiod, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include multi-cluster, infrastructure, and networking, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / networking / istio / multi-cluster / index, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
